competitors.name: Ola
competitors.description: Driver background check badge + live trip sharing to trusted contacts. Launched in India Feb 2026.

competitors.name: Uber
competitors.description: Twilio-backed masked phone numbers for driver-rider communication. India rollout March 2026.

competitors.name: Rapido
competitors.description: SOS button on both driver and rider apps, with optional trip audio recording. April 2026.

competitors.name: Ola
competitors.description: Real-time trip-by-trip earnings breakdown, weekly summary, and tax export. Q1 2026.

competitors.name: Rapido
competitors.description: Surge price capped at 2.0× with rider notification. Positioned as fairness feature.

insight: All 3 major competitors shipped safety features in Q1 2026. RideHailing Safety & SOS is 3-4 weeks behind. This is the highest-retention feature category — drivers choose platforms with safety features.
